opinion.h4: HUBBARD v. BOARD OF EDUCATION OF NEW YORK CITY. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 307, Misc. Decided October 9, 1961.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: JOHNSON v. DISTRICT COURT OF IOWA, (1961)
opinion.p: JOHNSON ET AL. v. DISTRICT COURT OF IOWA IN AND FOR FAYETTE COUNTY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF IOWA. No. 331, Misc. Decided October 9, 1961.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
